name: vscode-stm
description: VS Code syntax highlighting for the Semantic Transform Model (STM) language

scripts.test: npm run test:fixtures && npm run test:golden
scripts.validate:grammar: node -e "const g=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('syntaxes/stm.tmLanguage.json','utf8')); if(!g.scopeName)throw new Error('missing scopeName'); console.log('grammar OK, scopeName='+g.scopeName)"
scripts.validate: npm run validate:manifest && npm run validate:grammar
